response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC (0.46) is below our minimum sharing threshold (0.65), and our own SoC is declining rapidly in islanded mode—we must prioritize self-preservation until recovery above 70%.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.65, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: SoC declining rapidly due to outbound sharing; must prioritize self-preservation in islanded mode. Accepting only minimal shares to neighbors until SoC recovers above 70%..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
